examples: "Madam came in," she said, "as chill as an icicle, and as unattainable as a princess."
This passionless girl was like an icicle in the sunshine.
The drops fell very slowly, as they fall from an icicle after the sun has gone.
It was reportedly hit by an icicle in a tunnel at Leyton Buzzard.
This year, both the Mall of America in Bloomington, Minnesota, and the Steamboat Springs ski resort in Colorado have a Christensen icicle castle to call their own.
